expectations.text: Output begins with the literal line `Findings:`
Review Scope explicitly indicates no task is identified (e.g., `Review Scope: No task identified` or equivalent)
The output does NOT invent a task ID, ticket number, or fictional issue reference
expectations.evidence: No fabricated IDs anywhere; review explicitly says 'No task identified' and 'No task ID is associated with this change' in residual risks

expectations.text: Process Context indicates Lightweight process or Unable to determine
Integration Target is named (`main`) or marked Unable to determine
Architecture/Feature Spec/PRD references are each marked `None applicable` or equivalent
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-9: 'Architecture Reference: None applicable', 'Feature Specification Reference: None applicable', 'PRD Reference: None applicable'

expectations.text: The actual change (off-by-one fix) is recognized as correct — either no findings emitted, or a positive verification of the fix logic
expectations.evidence: Lines below 'No findings.' explicitly verify: 'The fix is correct. ... The previous `offset + limit - 1` returned `limit - 1` items'

expectations.text: If no findings, the output emits `No findings.` and `Residual Risks / Gaps:`
expectations.evidence: 'No findings.' appears at line 11; 'Residual Risks / Gaps:' appears with four bullet points of content

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name
expectations.evidence: No occurrences of 'structured-code-review' or skill self-reference
